name: button-group-input
visual_summary: The Button Group Input is a horizontal collection of input buttons, typically used in forms, that allow the user to select or interact with multiple options. It is commonly used when a single button is not sufficient to convey a action or selection. This component is ideal for scenarios requiring multiple options such as filtering or categorizing.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-input
Description: The Button Group Input is a horizontal collection of input buttons, typically used in forms, that allow the user to select or interact with multiple options. It is commonly used when a single button is not sufficient to convey a action or selection. This component is ideal for scenarios requiring multiple options such as filtering or categorizing.
Style: flat, bordered, rounded, customizable
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: button_group, input, form_element, selection, multiple_options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
